user.title: Choose source
user.description: Choose how this monitor receives P2000 alerts.

rss.title: Add RSS monitor
rss.description: Create a monitor using one or more RSS feeds. Separate multiple URLs with commas.

telegram.title: Add Telegram monitor
telegram.description: Enter your own Telegram API credentials from my.telegram.org. They are stored locally by Home Assistant. Telegram will send you a login code next.

telegram_code.title: Telegram login code
telegram_code.description: Enter the code Telegram sent to your account.

telegram_password.title: Telegram two-step verification
telegram_password.description: Your Telegram account uses two-step verification. Enter the password.

error.invalid_url: Enter at least one valid HTTP or HTTPS URL.
error.invalid_phone: Telegram did not accept this phone number.
error.invalid_code: The Telegram login code is invalid.
error.expired_code: The Telegram login code expired. Start setup again.
error.telegram_flood_wait: Telegram detected too many attempts. Try again later.
error.telegram_connection_error: Could not connect to Telegram or send a code.
error.telegram_login_error: Telegram could not complete sign-in. Check the logs.

init.title: Edit monitor
init.description: Edit this monitor's source settings and filters.

data.telegram_chat: Telegram chat ID or public username
